channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree branches, 8th March
item.description:
Tree branches hanging into the carriageway

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Basildon Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bag mess left near bins by Greenwood theatre, 8th March
item.description:
Torn bin bags left by Greenwood Theatre leaving scattered rubbish in the surrounding area. Noticed since yesterday.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18–20, Newcomen Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bad road surface, 8th March
item.description:
Plough Way SE16. The road surface all along this section is in a very poor condition. Needs resurfacing. Thank You.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 93, Plough Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle pavement parked., 8th March
item.description:
Vehicle is pavement parked.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clare Road, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped dishwasher stuff, 8th March
item.description:
Outside 54

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bramblebury Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 8th March
item.description:
Blocked drain resulting in water running into property

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingswood Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead cat on road, 8th March
item.description:
We had found a dead cat in the street outside lewington center at around 19:30 today. We had put the cat into a box and onto the pavement but there are a lot of school children and nurseries in the area.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Millender Walk, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missed recycling / waste collection?, 8th March
item.description:
Please collect recycling / waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): John Wilson Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big and deep potholes along the whole road, 8th March
item.description:
My car rim has been damaged because of these potholes on this road my mother works here and i come on this road daily, and its a big problem for a lot of people that work here. Its a bus garage. Deep and massive pot holes along the whole of Marsh Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marsh Lane, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple park lights not working and not fixed yet still, 8th March
item.description:
Can Peabody please fix this asap instead of lying on other posts, shows the level of incompetence by them to fix this. Anti social behaviour is now common in this park cause of no lights, it's dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pettman Crescent, Plumstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cones placed to “reserve” parking and improper EV charging, 8th March
item.description:
Beaconsfield Road Se94ee end - residents have put out cones to reserve parking spaces on the public road. Residents on the same side continually drive over the grass and parking on it/over the pavement to charge their electric cars causing trip hazards, obstruction and damage to the public grass.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaconsfield Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Partly fallen tree, 8th March
item.description:
A large branch from a tree has broken off

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Enfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement, 8th March
item.description:
The pavements in this street, Arthur Road, and surrounding streets are extremely uneven especially near the trees. As a wheelchair user I hardly ever go out as I feel so unsafe in my chair. I need someone to push me and I am constantly being crashed into the raised paving. If I wasn’t strapped in I would fall out of the chair. This has been like this for years and has been complained about before but nothing is ever done.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arthur Road, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus stop riddled with pot holes, 8th March
item.description:
The Harland Road (R) bus stop has multiple pot holes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Baring Road, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Severe damage around speed bump on Baring Road, 8th March
item.description:
That section of the road has deteriorated recently and is ramping up the traffic noise and vibrations in nearby houses.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Baring Road, Chinbrook, Grove Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked right of way, 8th March
item.description:
The right of way from Chapman's Lane towards Hockenden is blocked with ropes and wires strung across. This is just before the Farmers field with cattle.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapman's Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bathtub and other waste dumped, 8th March
item.description:
Behind the block of flats in Howard Court, rubbish has been dumped, including a bathtub and bathroom fittings. 2 weeks approx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29-31, Peckham Rye, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In front of academy court, 8th March
item.description:
One mattress and two bin bags

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 8th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapman's Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
